summary: Tested office_version/office_license equipment fields (backend CRUD + frontend form/detail) and PDF reports (equipment PDF includes Office section; maintenance PDF header includes assigned employee name). All 6 pytest backend tests PASSED. PDF content extraction via pypdf confirmed 'Office', 'Office 365', 'Lic. Office' labels in equipment PDF and confirmed assigned employee 'Juan Pérez' appears alongside 'TEST-MPDF-D459534B' in the maintenance PDF header. Frontend Software tab renders 'Microsoft Office' section with data-testid office-version-input & office-license-input; Equipment Detail page displays the Office card properly.
critical_code_review_comments: report_routes.py line 664 truncates eq_info to 45 chars — long assigned names may be cut off (e.g. 'LONG-INV-CODE-123 - Very Long Full Name - Desktop' > 45 chars). Consider widening cell or truncating only the equipment_type portion to preserve the employee name.

equipment_routes.py update_equipment uses eq_data.model_dump() (line 107) which OVERWRITES all optional fields to null when the PUT payload omits them. Any client that sends a partial update will silently wipe assigned_to, custom_fields, passwords, etc. Consider exclude_unset=True or a dedicated EquipmentUpdate model.

report_routes.py line 72 conditionally renders the Software section only when os_name/antivirus_name/office_version is set — if only office_license is provided without office_version, Office will not appear. Minor; probably acceptable.
equipment_routes.py create/update do not validate company_id/branch_id/assigned_to reference existing records — silently stores orphan FKs.
seed_data_creation: Created equipment TEST-OFF-{uuid} and TEST-MPDF-D459534B (assigned to Juan Pérez) plus a maintenance log for PDF header validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_office_fields_and_maintenance_pdf.py covers all 7 requested checks. PDF body content verification uses pypdf (installed). Equipment TEST-OFF-002 has office_version='Office 365' for UI verification. The maintenance list PDF is generated at GET /api/reports/maintenance/pdf without query params; it iterates ALL maintenance logs globally.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. All requested features function end-to-end.
